info.title: Ager API
info.description: Link-first civic news aggregator. Sprint 4: request-time recommender feed (GET /api/feed), interactions, interests, reading lists, stats, sources.

post.summary: Record a user interaction (VIEW/OPENED_EXTERNAL/READ_COMPLETED/SAVE/DISCARD/SHARE). Idempotent per (user, article, type).

get.summary: List the active interest taxonomy (id, slug, name, parentId, description).
GDPR art. 15 export (JSON download). One export per user per 24h.

post.summary: Replace the user's onboarding interests (Source=Explicit, default weight 3.0).

get.summary: Reading-variety indices (distinct-source ratio, top-topic share, counts by type) over window.
List the caller's reading lists (id, name, itemCount).
Public source detail (name, type, publisher group, license/ToS fields).

Bearer.description: JWT Authorization header using the Bearer scheme.
